description: I use WeTracked for my TikTok ads, and it’s been a game-changer. In the past, I used a Shopify app, but it never tracked conversions quickly or accurately. I kept seeing ads for WeTracked everywhere, so I decided to give it a shot—and I haven’t looked back since. Tracking is fast, accurate, and super reliable.
author: Mike C.
pros: What I like most about WeTracked.io is how quickly and accurately it can trigger the pixel, which is a huge advantage for running my TikTok ads. In the past, I struggled with other tracking tools and Shopify apps that were slow to pick up conversions or didn’t record them accurately, which made scaling campaigns much harder. With WeTracked.io, I can see my conversions in near real time, which means I can make faster, more confident decisions on my ads and budgets. This speed and reliability have made it much easier for me to optimize and grow my campaigns efficiently.
cons: Honestly, there’s not much I dislike about WeTracked.io because it’s solved a lot of my tracking issues. If I had to point out one thing, it would be that it takes a little time at first to fully understand all the features and set everything up correctly. The dashboard has a lot of useful options, but for someone completely new to tracking, it can feel a bit overwhelming in the beginning. That said, once I got the hang of it, it became second nature and now I barely even think about it—it just works in the background perfectly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with wetracked.io has been excellent. The platform is user-friendly, and I was able to get started quickly without any technical headaches. review_title: Finally, a Clean and Simple Way to Manage UTMs
description: Overall, our experience with WeTracked.io has been excellent. It’s taken what used to be a messy, manual process and turned it into something streamlined, consistent, and actually enjoyable to use. It’s saved us time, improved our tracking accuracy, and given our team a shared space to manage campaign links without confusion. We’re excited to keep using it as we scale — it’s now a non-negotiable part of our marketing toolkit.
author: Sarah M.
pros: The best part about WeTracked.io is how easy it makes UTM tracking — no more spreadsheets, no more manual errors. The interface is intuitive, the link builder is super fast, and the folder/tag system keeps everything organised. We also love being able to collaborate as a team — everyone is using the same naming conventions, which has massively improved the accuracy of our reporting. It’s a small tool that’s made a big difference to how we manage and measure campaigns.
cons: What we liked least is the lack of a mobile app. As a fast-moving team, we’re often needing to grab or create links on the go — especially during product launches or when replying to customers quickly. Having to log into the desktop version can slow things down a bit. A mobile-friendly version or dedicated app would make it even more seamless.
